content.title: Purpose
content.body: Would guide scenario and acceptance-criteria planning for App Behavior specs.

content.title: Already Decision-Complete
content.body: The UX system identifies scenarios and acceptance criteria as part of detailed behavior refinement.

content.title: Needs Clarity
content.body: Needs exact relationship to proof rows and App Behavior schema fields before becoming a full template.

content.title: Authority To Review
content.body: Review ux-system model, schema, examples, and testing proof matrix docs.

content.title: Promotion Criteria
content.body: Promote when the template can define acceptance roadmap fields without duplicating proof planning templates.

content.title: Possible Outcomes
content.body: Promote, merge, keep as appendix, or delete.
